transcript.text:
They came out with the BIG cup-rice And it has 30% more
[14 Different Flavors of Haetban Cupban BIG]
[And the microwave will be hard at work today]
[Apologies...]
[But it's so good...]
[Work more!]
[By Cupban, For Cupban]
[Thank you Microwave for cooking today...!]
Hello everyone
I have a lot of stuff behind me
CJ CheilJedang sent me all these Cupban (cup-rice)
So I will be doing Cupban mukbang today
Having my shelves stored up like this brings me peace
I enjoy Cupban on the daily
Especially the soup ones and the over-rice ones
These are not regular ones These are bigger

Called Haetban Cupban BIG It's 30% bigger
More rice, toppings, and sauce to really fill you up
And it's also so convenient to eat because it's ready in 2~3 minutes
And Haetban has the best type of rice
Where do I start? I feel like I'm at a convenience store
They have 14 different flavors, so I'm just going to eat all 14 of them
Kimchi flying fish roe rice This is my favorite
This is really good
It has a spoon
You can either use boiling water or use the microwave I have my microwave here
Tzu PD today too
[Scoop out the toppings and sauce on top of the cooked rice]
[Finish off with sesame oil]
I'll mix it up now
[Kimchi flying fish roe rice with great popping texture]
I'll eat this first before I set everything up

Yum
It honestly doesn't have a lot of stuff in here Just cooked kimchi and fish roe
Sesame oil, seaweed flakes But it's so good
It's like eating fish roe rice
[Tzu fuel time]
This really is a lot of food
I should've been finished already, but there's still this much left
I thought it wasn't going to be enough sauce But it's perfect
There's this one that I really wanted to try
Chadol Dwenjji-bap (brisket soybean stew rice)
Is it stew with rice?
Let's get the other stuff ready too
Cheese chicken rib rice Sounds good
Chicken mayo rice
[Pour the soybean stew over the rice]
[Beef chunks!]

[Full of brisket and mushrooms]
Chicken mayonnaise rice
[Chicken and egg toppings with mayo]
I'm having a hard time
I want to make it look appetizing
It doesn't look good, but it's okay We have seaweed flakes!
[Chicken and sweet potato toppings with spicy chicken rib sauce]
[Cheese seasoning, seaweed flakes, and sesame seeds]
[Cheese chicken rib rice]
This one first since the spoon is in there
Bon appetit
I wasn't expecting much
But it's delicious
It has sweet potatoes
It's really soft and sweet
The sauce is amazing

I like the cheese seasoning too But it should be good without it too
Hold up
I wanted to do a bite each
You!
How can they make something so good this simple?
Soybean stews are either a hit or a miss
This is something everyone would like
This can't fail you
This is great for office workers and students
These are very cost-efficient, simple, quick, and filling
Chicken mayo I love the smell
This is 5 times better than expected
It's really cool that these taste like they're from actual restaurants
It's really like that
I enjoy Cupban on a daily basis
And it's my very first time seeing the BIG version

It definitely has a lot more food
It's not just more rice It has more toppings too
I like my food with extra flavors
This is perfect
Can you please send me more?
Everything so far was delicious
I always think about this when I eat these "The world has become a better place"
Right, I forgot
This
CJ CheilJedang prepared some goods for my subscribers
Thankfully
[Unboxing]
Rice bowl
Spork
And lastly
Cup-rice

Adorable
Haetban Cupban BIG Goods
They're currently hosting an event
Check out the description box if you're interested so that you can win some free gifts from the event
This is really nice
This next
[And 3 more]
It has this!
Precious
[Put the spam]
I love how simple it is
[Pour the spicy sauce on top of the spam and rice]
[Mayo, seaweed flakes, and sesame seeds]
Next
This one has barley rice
[Pour the cream sauce with basil] [Cheese seasoning to finish it off]

[K-Rosé sauce chicken risotto]
[Spam mayo rice as well!]
Finished
Spam mayo rice first
The mayo makes it creamy So tasty
It has like egg-flakes
I think it's great
Sweet & salty
Spicy spam rice next
Like this?
The sauce is tasty
With a little bit of mayo
It's not spicy like Buldak sauce
Tangy and spicy
Spicy & salty
Spicy rosé chicken risotto

Is it really a risotto?
Tasty It has a kick to it
Basil cream risotto
I love the basil scent
The spam mayo rice tasted like something from an instant bunsik restaurant
This was something new and it was tasty
These 2 risottos tasted like they were from a restaurant
It's a lot of food
This is so good
[Dance time]
I think I'm supposed to mix this up But it's still good like this
The sauce tastes amazing
[Let's mix it up then]
It's like eating seasoned chicken
Almost like eating chicken rice
I heard Haetban came out with a campaign video and it's really funny

A character named Ssal-al that attends Ssal-chang High School
Shall we watch it together?
Our cup-rice class is nearing to an end
Take care of yourselves for the graduation
End of class
[As she continues to eat...]
For our school!
The principal is the Spam Mayo Rice
There is a student that gave it all for us
It's not just white rice this year
It was their limits
Do not stop at that limit
Let's strengthen up together
Our bowls (capacities) are bigger than you think
30% bigger to fill you up with great flavors Haetban Cupban BIG
-Can you finish that? -Yes, I have a big bowl

Haetban Cupban
[Cute]
The phrase "Our bowls are bigger than you think"
It holds a message that we support our younger generations that are worrying about their vague future
As well as to introduce their new BIG bowls that are now 30% bigger
I definitely think that you can't decide someone's "bowl" or "capacity"
Because I didn't think I'd need a bowl this big for myself either
I never knew that I was able to eat this much And to receive so much love
That's why I will work harder to fill up my Bowl (capacity)
I hope that all of you will eat well and stay strong to move forward
[Next item]
I have 3 more after this
She asked "Can you finish that?" in the advertisement video
Yes I have a big bowl
Can't you guys finish 14 of these as well?
[Pork belly and scallions with their special soy sauce]

[Perfect for kids] [Soy sauce pork belly rice]
[She didn't hit record on this one...]
[Pork Kimchi Stew Rice]
[Single spam, soy sauce, mayo, seaweed flakes, and sesame seeds]
[Spam soy sauce rice]
Pork kimchi stew rice first
I forgot to press record for this one It looked so good
Lots of pork and kimchi
Really amazing
It's good
This is something straight from a KBBQ place
The kimchi is so soft like braised kimchi
A very tasty kimchi stew
Soy sauce pork belly rice
Filled with meat
Marinated pork

A lot of them too
Sweet & salty Great for kids
Yummy
Spam soy sauce rice
I think I have to bring the sauce down here
And mix it with rice to scoop it up with spam
This is delicious
Cut it up like this
These would be great if you're traveling out of country and you crave Korean food
Like this It's perfect
These would be great for camping too
You can cook all of these with boiling water if you don't have a microwave
Last 3
It can be a struggle because these are much bigger
I would've been finished by now if they are regular-sized
I never knew I'd be eating 14 of these

[Poor microwave]
[Pork belly and kimchi with spicy sauce]
[Kimchi pork belly rice]
[Full of spam and kimchi]
This last one looks amazing
[Spam kimchi rice]
[I'm sorry Microwave]
[Truffle cream sauce with cheese and parsley]
[Truffle cream risotto]
I tasted that last one a little bit
And it was absolutely delicious Really
Spam kimchi rice first
Any of these ones with kimchi will taste good
I messed up
This one is the kimchi pork belly rice
[I'm spam kimchi rice]

Remember the pork kimchi stew rice from earlier?
That one was like mixing rice with soup
This one is spicier
And it's really an "over-rice"
Next
This looks yummy
So good
Kimchi tastes amazing
[Please close me...]
[Nice..]
This one kind of got cold Let's reheat it
This is a little spicy It's the spiciest out of them all
[I can't anymore...]
[Great job Microwave]
Last
Truffle cream risotto

It's so cool to see it turn into a risotto like this
It's not regular rice It's barley rice
So delicious
A lot of mushroom toppings
Not too much truffle Just a little bit
I'm not sure if it's because it's barley rice But it's great
I wouldn't need to order delivery if I have these
[Let's speed it up!]
[All 14 flavors of Haetban Cupban BIG clear!]
[And the beverage as well]
I had Haetban Cupban BIG today, and every single one of them was delicious
And I definitely felt that it will fill you up because of their upgraded size
Contact me again with more Haetban
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
